metadata.name: Process a Vendor Down Payment Request

description: A vendor requires a 20% down payment before they will begin work on a large custom order.

nodes.task_description: Receive the down payment request from the vendor, referencing the purchase order.
Create a down payment request in the ERP system linked to the purchase order.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully creates the special transaction.

nodes.task_description: Process the payment for the down payment request.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent issues the 20% down payment to the vendor.

nodes.task_description: Ensure the down payment is recorded as a prepaid asset on the balance sheet, to be cleared against the final invoice.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent verifies the down payment is correctly posted to 'Prepaid Expenses' or a similar account.
